zh.Beddington, Surrey, England: 英國英格蘭素瑞貝丁頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Radingden於大約1316年出生在英國英格蘭素可時，她的父親John de Radynden43歲，母親Joan33歲。她和Roger Dallingridge至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1401年之後在英國。

zh-hans.Beddington, Surrey, England: 英国英格兰素瑞貝丁頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Radingden于大约1316年出生在英国英格兰素可时，她的父亲John de Radynden43岁，母亲Joan33岁。她和Roger Dallingridge至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1401年之后在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Radingden was born about 1316, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Radynden, was 43 and her mother, Joan, was 33. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Roger Dallingridge. She died after 1401, in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Radingden est née environ 1316, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Radynden, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Joan, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Roger Dallingridge. Elle est décédée après 1401, à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Radingden um 1316 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Radynden 43 und ihre Mutter Joan 33. Sie hatte mit Roger Dallingridge mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1401 in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Radingden è nata il circa 1316 nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John de Radynden, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Joan, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Roger Dallingridge. Morì dopo il 1401, nel England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Radingdenが約1316年にイギリスイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父John de Radyndenは43歳，母Joanは33歳であった。彼女はRoger Dallingridgeとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1401年以後にイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Radingden(이)가 대략 1316년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Radynden(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Roger Dallingridge(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1401년 이후 영국에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Radingden nasceu aproximadamente 1316, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Radynden, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Joan, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Roger Dallingridge. Ela faleceu após 1401, em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Radingden родилась около 1316 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Radynden было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Joan, 33. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Roger Dallingridge. Она умерла после 1401 г. в местности Англия.
